property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage or stops a focused energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack or energy attack. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, the next attack you perform this Combat does -2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Your opponent's Main Personality loses 1 power stage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, discard a Non-Combat card in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages and 2 life cards of damage. If used by Hercule, this attack stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevent 5 power stages of damage from a physical attack. Discard an Ally in play. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your Main Personality is Pikkon, you may use this card to stop a physical attack instead. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If "Red Flying Kick" is in your discard pile, gain 5 power stages. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack and stops a physical attack performed by your opponent during his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 1 level. The next energy attack you perform this Combat costs 0 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If successful and "Red Trap" is in play, discard all Non-Combat cards in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Red Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. You can only perform this attack if you have no cards in your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw 3 cards. Place the top card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, draw the bottom card of your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If stopped, place the top card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, shuffle this card back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, draw the bottom card of your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, remove a Non-Combat card in play from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. You may discard any amount of cards from your hand. For every 2 cards discarded, look at your opponent's hand and choose a card. The chosen card(s) are discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, discard an opponent's Ally in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. The next physical attack you perform this Combat does +1 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, your next energy attack this Combat costs -2 power stages to perform to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Stops an energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If "Blue Flying Kick" is in your discard pile, gain 5 power stages. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If used by Goku, gain 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If performed by Kid Trunks, this attack does 5 life cards of damage instead. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Discard an ally in play. If Goten or Kid Trunks are in play, discard 2 Allies instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Stops an energy attack performed during your opponent's next "Attacker Attacks" phase. This card can stop focused attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Energy attack. If successful, place this card at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, prevent 3 life cards of damage from the next attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Raise your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack does 5 power stages of damage instead. Raise your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Lower your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: All attacks with "Majin" in the title do +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Discard the top 2 cards of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage for each Non-Combat card your opponent has in play. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, discard all Non-Combat cards in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. Gain 10 power stages. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, discard 2 Non-Combat cards in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If Videl is in play, remove the top 5 cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, this attack also does +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +10 power stages of damage. This must be the first card you use during Combat. If successful, you cannot perform physical attacks for the remainder of Combat. If stopped, discard the top 5 cards of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 2 power stages of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, this attack stays on the table to be used 2 more times this Combat. If stopped, raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If this attack is performed against a Majin, discard one of your opponent's Drills in play and raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, stops all energy attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, you may search your Life Deck for a Battleground and place it into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If stopped, remove the top 2 cards of your opponent's Life Deck from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Red Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level for each Dragon Ball your opponent controls.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. All energy attacks you perform for the remainder of Combat cost -1 power stages to perform to a minimum of 0 and do +1 power stages of damage for each Ally your opponent has in play. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If this attack is performed against a Majin, this attack does +7 life cards of damage instead. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Chapuchai only. Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage. This attack stays on the table to be used 4 more times this Combat. Damage from this attack cannot be modified. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: If this Drill is discarded from your hand, place it into play instead. Whenever an opponent's card makes you discard a card from your hand, draw a card afterward.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. If stopped, gain 3 power stages and place this card at the bottom of your Life Deck. Unless your Main Personality is Hercule, limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. All attacks performed against a Majin do +1 power stages of damage. All successful physical attacks you perform remove the bottom card of your opponent's Life Deck from the game before damage is dealt. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Master Roshi only. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, all energy attacks performed by your Allies do +1 power stages of damage for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Goten only. Attach this card to your Main Personality. All physical attacks this personality performs do +1 power stages of damage, and if successful, lower your opponent's anger 1 level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage or stops a physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Choose one of your opponent's personality in play. That personality loses 5 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Physical attack doing +7 power stages of damage. If successful, raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Physical attack doing 8 power stages of damage. If performed against Videl, this is a focused physical attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack stays on the table to be used 2 more times this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, discard a Non-Combat card in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage and place the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, place the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. If stopped, remove the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If successful, shuffle the top card of your discard pile back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If your opponent declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, this attack does 7 power stages of damage instead. If your declared a Tokui-Waza, shuffle this card back into your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack is a focused physical attack. If successful, gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Gain 4 power stages. If performed against a Majin, this attack is a focused physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 4 power stages to perform. If stopped, your opponent discards the top 4 cards of his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, discard all of your opponent's Allies in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage for the remainder of Combat. Take a Dragon Ball in play your opponent controls and place it at the bottom of its owner's Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If successful, place the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack does 6 power stages of damage and raises your anger 1 level. Unless your Main Personality is Pikkon, remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Black Tokui-Waza, this card may also perform a physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage during your next "Attacker Attacks" phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, all energy attacks cost +2 power stages to perform for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage for each Blue Style card in your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. You can only use this card after you have taken 5 or more life cards of damage from 1 attack this Combat. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, search your discard pile for up to 3 Allies and place them in play at their highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, the next physical attack you perform this Combat does +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. If successful, discard a card at random from your hand. You must have at least 1 other card in your hand to perform this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +8 power stages of damage. Your opponent does not take life cards of damage from this attack. If stopped, remove the top 2 cards of your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If your opponent declared a Black Tokui-Waza, this attack stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Endurance 1. Raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Shuffle a Dragon Ball your opponent controls in play into its owner's Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage for each Non-Combat card you have in play. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If successful, discard one of your Non-Combat cards in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you play a Named Card, gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If this attack is performed against a Majin, all of your physical attacks do +1 life cards of damage for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a focused physical attack or stops a focused energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, the next energy attack you perform this Combat is a focused energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Raise your anger 1 level. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, immediately after you deal life cards of damage with a Red Style energy attack, place the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks cost -1 power stages to perform to a minimum of 1 and do +2 life cards of damage for the remainder of Combat. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage for each Dragon Ball your opponent controls. If your opponent declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, this attack is a focused energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, you may search your Life Deck for any card and discard it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful and you delcared a Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If successful, lower your opponent's anger to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If your opponent declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, this attack is a focused energy attack and lowers your opponent's anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Attach this card to your opponent's Main Personality after successfully performing an energy attack. That player cannot use Non-Combat cards while this card is attached. Remove from the game when that opponent performs a successful attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If performed against a Majin, this attack does +6 power stages of damage instead and lowers your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If performed against the Ginyu Force, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops a physical attack. If used by Goten, prevent 2 life cards of damag from the next attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If your opponent declared a Namekian Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's Main Personality to 0 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops a focused physical attack or stops a focused energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: All "Saiyan Heritage only" cards that perform attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, shuffle this card back into your Life Deck after use. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, the next energy attack you perform this Combat costs 0 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you and your opponent declared a Tokui-Waza, prevent 5 life cards of damage from the next attack performed against you this Combat. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, and you declared a Tokui-Waza, shuffle this card back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Namekian Tokui-Waza, your opponent may not gain power stages until the beginning of his next turn. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If the bottom card of your discard pile is a Saiyan Style card, prevent 4 power stages of damage from the next attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If performed against Pikkon, this attack does +7 power stages of damage instead. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck Only. Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If your opponent's Main Personality is a Majin, this is a focused physical attack. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +7 power stages of damage. If successful, you may not use a card during your next "Defender Defends" phase. Lower your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard 2 Non-Combat cards in play. If Gohan or Videl are in play, discard 1 Non-Combat card in play instead. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your attacks gain, "If successful discard a Drill in play." All of your Black Style physical attacks gain, "If successful, you may discard a Non-Combat card" instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks you perform do +1 life cards of damage. All Blue Style energy attacks gain, "If successful, raise your anger 1 level."

property.name: Text
property.value: All focused attacks cost +3 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 4 power stages of damage. If successful, prevent 4 power stages of damage from the next attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Place the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. You may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If successful, remove a Drill in play from the game. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power three times per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per game during any Non-Combat Step, raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, remove the top card of your discard pile from the game. If it's a Named card that matches your Main Personality, name a non-Dragon Ball card. Your opponent searches his Life Deck and discards a copy of that card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, Combat cards may not be played for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, draw the bottom card of your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first physical attack Froug performs in Combat does +6 power stages of damage. All successful physical attacks performed against Froug do -3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing X power stages of damage and costs X power stages to perform. You choose the amount of X when you perform this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per game, you may search either your Life Deck or your discard pile for up to 5 Drills and place them into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All your attacks do +1 power stages of damage. Grand Kai does not need to take control of Combat to use this power.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's Main Personality 1 personality level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If your discard pile has more cards than your opponent's when you first perform this attack, you may perform this attack twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All energy attacks you perform do +1 power stages of damage for every Named card in your discard pile. At the beginning of your turn, remove 2 Named cards in your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage. All your physical attacks performed against Videl do +3 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Place the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, your opponent removes the top 3 cards of his discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, draw the bottom card of your Life Deck. If it is a Namekian Style card, you may show it to your opponent and draw another card from the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Twice per game during your Non-Combat Step, you may choose an opponent. That opponent cannot use his Mastery for the remainder of the turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +8 power stages of damage. If successful, remove your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage. If you perform a successful Orange Style physical attack, all other physical attacks you perform for the remainder of Combat do an additional +1 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, remove the bottom card of your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, remove the top or bottom 3 cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 15 life cards of damage -1 life card for every card in your opponent's discard pile, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All energy attacks performed by Pikkon gain "If successful, remove a Non-Combat card in play from the game."

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you perform an energy attack, lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If your opponent stops one of your Red Style energy attacks, he discards the top 2 cards of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, draw a card. If it is a Saiyan Style card, you may show it to your opponent and prevent 4 power stages and 4 life cards of damage from the first attack performed against you. Otherwise, prevent 4 power stages of damage from the first attack performed against you.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per game during your Non-Combat Step, you may search your Life Deck for a level 1 Ally and place it in play at 3 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: If Tapkar has not used any other personality powers this turn when entering Combat as the defender, remove the top 4 cards of your Life Deck from the game, draw 2 cards, and raise your anger 3 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: If Tapkar has not used any other personality powers this turn when entering Combat as the defender, remove the top 6 cards of your Life Deck from the game, draw 3 cards, and raise your anger 4 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You cannot win with the Most Powerful Personality Victory.) Constant Combat Power: If Tapkar has not used any other personality powers this turn when entering Combat as the defender, remove the top 8 cards of your Life Deck from the game, draw 3 cards, and raise your anger 5 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If "Arqua's Arena" is in play, raise Arqua to his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 4 power stages of damage. If "Arqua's Arena" is in play, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage. If "Arqua's Arena" is in play, all of your attacks do an additional +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per game during your "Attacker Attacks" phase, you may remove up to 2 Non-Combat cards in play from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Allies may not take control of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. The first physical attack you perform in Combat does +1 power stage of damage for each card in your removed from the game pile, to a maximum of +10. You may only have 1 copy of this Drill in play at a time.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing 1 life card of damage for each Non-Combat card in play and in your discard pile. This must be the first attack you perform during Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. If successful, name 3 different cards. Search your opponent's Life Deck for 1 copy of each of these cards and remove them from the game. If stopped, remove your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 1 life card of damage. If successful, remove the bottom 5 cards of your opponent's Life Deck from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may search your Life Deck for up to 3 Vegeta Named cards and discard them. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage for every Vegeta Named card in your discard pile. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, shuffle 3 Vegeta Named cards from your discard pile back into your Life Deck and lower your opponwnt's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Any Vegeta Named cards that say "Remove from the game after use" now say "Discard after use" instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, search your Life Deck for Videl's level 1 and place her into play at 5 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your Allies in play cannot be removed from the game. If Videl is in play as your Ally, your Allies power up 1 extra stage during the Power Up Step.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If Videl is in play as your Ally, shuffle any Allies in your discard pile back into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 1 power stage of damage for each personality it play. Raise Gohan to his highest power stage. If Videl is in play as your Ally, place the top card of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering Combat, search your discard pile for a Non-Combat card, place it into your hand. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: The first physical attack Goku performs does +1 power stages of damage for each Non-Combat card you have in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 1 life card of damage for each Non-Combat card you have in play. If you declared a Tokui-Waza raise Goku to his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, search your Life Deck for a Freestyle Drill and place it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If stopped, raise Goten to his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, raise your anger 1 level. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Remove 2 cards in your discard pile from the game. If successful, draw the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 7 power stages of damage. You must remove the top 2 cards of your discard pile from the game to perform this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If stopped, raise Kid Trunks to his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, raise your anger 1 level. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Choose 2 cards in your discard pile and remove them from the game. If successful, draw the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Discard the top 2 cards of your Life Deck. If successful, gain 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. If stopped, discard the top 3 cards of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 9 power stages of damage. If successful, discard an Ally in play. If stopped, discard the top 3 cards of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 10 power stages of damage. If successful, shuffle the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile back into your Life Deck. If stopped, discard the top 3 cards of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If stopped, discard the top 2 cards of your Life Deck. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this power may be used twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, discard the top card of your Life Deck. If it is a Physical Combat card, you may place it into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the attacker, choose up to 2 cards in your discard pile. Your opponent chooses one to be removed from the game, and the other is placed into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your Freestyle attacks do +1 life cards of damage. The first physical attack you perform during Combat becomes a focused physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your Freestyle attacks do +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 power stages of damage for every card in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, skip your opponent's next "Attacker Attacks" phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 8 power stages of damage. Remove a Non-Combat card in play from the game. You must be able to remove a Non-Combat card in play in order to use this power.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, search your discard pile for a Martial Arts Styled card and shuffle it into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Place the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. Remove 2 cards in your discard pile from the game. Gain 1 power stage for each remaining card in your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. If you have no cards left in your discard pile the first time each combat you perform this attack, you may use this power twice per Combat. Lower your opponent's anger 3 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Any cards in your discard pile cannot be removed from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If your opponent is a Villain, this attack does +5 power stages of damage instead. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you did not declare a Tokui-Waza, you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, remove the top card of your opponent's Life Deck from the game. If it is a Physical Combat card, your opponent's Main Personality loses 5 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Goku or Majin Vegeta only. Use when entering Combat. Allies and Combat cards may not be played or used for the remainder of Combat. Raise Majin Vegeta and Goku to their highest power stage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If performed against a Majin, this attack does +7 power stages of damage instead. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. All of your physical attacks do +3 power stages of damage for the remainder of Combat. Draw a card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Attach this card to one of your opponent's perspnalities. When entering Combat, this personality loses 2 power stages and your Main Personality gains 2 power stages. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, your opponent must pass during his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's Life Deck and place them back in any order. Draw the bottom card of your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Costs 2 life cards to perform. If successful, discard all Allies in play. If performed against Goku, this is a focused physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: All focused attacks do +1 power stages and +1 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If Goten is in play you may use this power twice per Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack or energy attack performed by a Majin. This card can stop focused attacks performed by Majins. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck Only. Remove a Dragon Ball in play from the game. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Stops a physical or energy attack. This card can stop a focused attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. When entering Combat, you may remove the bottom card of your opponent's discard pile from the game. If that card is a Freestyle card, gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and if your opponent declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, discard all Drills in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage for each Non-Combat card your opponent has in play. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack does 2 power stages of damage for each Non-Combat card your opponent has in play instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Tapkar only. Physical attack doing 1 power stage of damage for each of your cards that is in your removed from the game pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Videl only. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 3 levels. If your opponent's Main Personality is a villain, this attack does +8 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise or lower your or your opponent's anger by 1 or 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Capture a Dragon Ball immediately after damage is dealt from a physical attack you performed that does not use the Physical Attack Table.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Discard an Ally in play. Non-Combat cards may not be used for the remainder of Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, you may prevent 2 power stages of damage from an attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If Jeice is your Main Personality, look at the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile. If you find a Level 1 Ally place it in play at 3 power stages above 0 and remove the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Cell only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, discard one of your opponent’s Allies in play and your opponent’s Main Personality loses 1 power stage for each power stage the Ally was at above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: The next attack you perform does +X power stages of damage. One of your personalities in play gains X power stages. X = number of Allies you have in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All Physical Combat cards in your Life Deck with no Endurance have Endurance 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful and the bottom card of your discard pile is a Goku Named card, you may draw that card into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, all cards in your Life Deck with no Endurance have Endurance 1 for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Any attacks Vegeta performs that allow him to gain anger do +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Hercule may play and use "Villains only" cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard a Non-Combat card in play. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. Gain 3 power stages.
